literal: an extravagant or impossible thing that someone demands or expects
an acceptance formula acknowledging bad luck or an unfortunate outcome
a colloquial assertion meaning 'those are the facts' or 'that's the way it is'
individuals who stand out will be forced to conform or be suppressed

relabelled_senses.definition: At that exact time and in that exact place; immediately and without delay.

literal: no literal meaning
a saying that attributes reliable knowledge or judgment to the sense of smell
a demand to speak with the person in authority rather than an assistant

relabelled_senses.definition: On a recent occasion; a short while ago (used to refer to a past event without specifying the exact time).

literal: no literal meaning
to frighten someone severely or to defeat decisively
written words or ideas have greater influence than physical force
a situation becomes more complicated or mysterious as new details emerge

relabelled_senses.definition: Physically visible or plainly exposed so that any onlooker can notice it.

literal: no literal meaning
a new person has arrived in authority and intends to enforce rules
there is no real substance or meaningful content in the thing discussed
a humorous way to explain why many people share an unusual trait due to local influence
used to skip over details indicating what followed is well known or obvious
an expression indicating something has been completed or achieved
a greeting used when one has located or encountered someone expected

relabelled_senses.definition: A phrase used when handing, giving, or presenting something to someone, equivalent to 'here you are.'

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: A phrase used to present, summarize, or conclude information, signifying 'that is the result' or 'that is all there is to it.'

literal: no literal meaning
